input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.5.7
            TITLE: temperature sensors must have appropriate electrical isolation that meets one of the two:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.5.7: Temperature sensors must have appropriate electrical isolation that meets one of the two:
EV.7.5.7 Temperature sensors must have appropriate electrical isolation that meets one of the two:  
• Between the sensor and cell  
• In the sensing circuit 
The isolation must consider both GLV/TS isolation as well as common mode voltages between 
sense locations.

final_answer:
Temperature sensors must have appropriate electrical isolation that meets one of the two:
• Between the sensor and cell
• In the sensing circuit
The isolation must consider both GLV/TS isolation as well as common mode voltages between sense locations.
